name: Grimfang · IL 3400
notes: Whispered to have been carved from the very bones of beasts now long extinct, this rare bow avails from old whispers about. Once marked, no quarry escapes the inevitable end. Artifact Equipment. Cannot Discard.

name: Grimfang · IL 3750
notes: Set Impending Doom unlocks at this tier.

name: Grimfang · IL 4450
notes: +50 Damage; gains Combat Advantage stat at this IL.

name: Grimfang · IL 4800
setBonus: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power (1.5s CD), 1 charge per 3s in combat. Unleashed grants: +4.5% Base Damage Boost. Charges and Unleashed lasts 20s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

name: Harrowed Messengers · IL 3400
notes: Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity. Cannot Discard. Cannot Sell.

name: Harrowed Messengers · IL 3750
notes: Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity.

name: Harrowed Messengers · IL 4450
notes: Modification: This slot will hold a bonus statistic chosen from a selection of the special statistics given by Epic and higher rarity artifact weapons. Select 'Manage Artifact Modifications' to select which statistic is slotted. Modification: This slot will hold an enhancement to one of the 10 Class Features of your class.

name: Harrowed Messengers · IL 4800
setBonus: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power (1.5s CD), 1 charge per 3s in combat. Unleashed grants: +4.9% Base Damage Boost. Charges and Unleashed lasts 20s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

name: Phantom's Mark
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 12% and your Damage is increased by 3%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: Binds on Pickup (Account), Binds on Equip (Character). A hunter's secret weapon, imbued with the essence of spectral beasts. It sharpens the senses, ensuring that no prey escapes notice.

name: Phantom Fang
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 12% and your Damage is increased by 3%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: Binds on Pickup (Account), Binds on Equip (Character). Forged from the spine of an ancient predator, this bow thirsts for the hunt. When the arrows reach their target, they fracture, rupturing anything they strike.

name: Deadshot's Mark
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 5%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: An inscribed hunting totem, carried by rangers of old. It sharpens the senses, ensuring that no prey escapes notice.

name: Phantom's Bite
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 5%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: A bow crafted from bleached wood and veined with eerie silver. Arrows released from it seem to leave behind a momentary afterimage before striking their prey.

Each stack grants the following bonuses: General: +0.25% Power, DPS: +0.5% Critical Severity, Healer: +0.5% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank: +0.5% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

equipBonuses.name: Momentum's Edge
equipBonuses.description: While moving, gain +3% Power and +0.6% Combat Advantage. If you stand still for more than 3 seconds, you lose all stacks. Max 5 Stacks: +2.5% Power and +3% Combat Advantage.

notes: Recommended. Reinforced: Empty. Binds on Pickup (Account), Binds on Equip (Character).

equipBonuses.name: Devastating Precision
equipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 20% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your enemy suffers -8% Critical Severity, while you gain +8% Critical Severity for 8 seconds (10 second cooldown).

equipBonuses.name: Focused Frenzy
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, for the next 30 seconds your next Encounter Power deals +75% more Damage.

equipBonuses.name: Steady Henson
equipBonuses.description: For every 8 seconds you are in combat, gain +1% Accuracy and +0.3% Recharge Speed. Max 7 Stacks: +7% Accuracy and +2.1% Recharge Speed.

equipBonuses.name: Kinetic Precision
equipBonuses.description: While moving, gain +1% Power and +0.7% Combat Advantage. If you stand still for more than 4 seconds, you lose all stacks. Max 5 Stacks: +5% Power and +3.5% Combat Advantage.

equipBonuses.name: Precision Against Odds
equipBonuses.description: Each enemy you are in combat with increases your Critical Strike by 1.8%. Max 5 targets: 9% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Lethal Focus
equipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain +3% Hit Points and +4% Accuracy for 7 seconds (5 second cooldown).

equipBonuses.name: Advantageous Strike
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your Powers, gain +3% Combat Advantage and +2.5% Power for 6 seconds (10 second cooldown).

notes: Binds on Pickup (Account), Binds on Equip (Character).

equipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Combat Advantage. Max Stacks: 10.

equipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown). Additionally, when Focused Daily triggers, you gain 2.5% Critical Severity for 10s.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Precision
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Critical Strike is increased by 1.5% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Predator
equipBonuses.description: +7% Damage in Wildspace. +2% Damage in non-Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Grace
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat in Wildspace, you gain 0.85% Forte. Max Stacks: 7 (10 in Wildspace).

equipBonuses.name: Shielded Strength
equipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP in Wildspace, gain 5% Damage and 2.5% Critical Severity. In non-Wildspace, the Damage bonus is reduced to 2%.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Presence
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, every 2 seconds you gain 875 Power and 0.5% Critical Strike. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 4,375 Power and 2.5% Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Precision
equipBonuses.description: +7.5% Critical Strike in Wildspace. +3% Critical Strike in non-Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Maximized Opportunity
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Combat Advantage is increased by 7%.

equipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
equipBonuses.description: When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (30 second cooldown).

equipBonuses.name: Butcher's Zeal
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 10 Action Points. Can only occur once every 5 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Hunter
equipBonuses.description: +5% Damage in Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Grace
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Forte increases by 7.5% for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Defender Strike
equipBonuses.description: Gain -1% Incoming Damage when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. When you are struck, the stacks are consumed and you gain 1% Base Damage Boost per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

equipBonuses.name: Escalating Torrent
equipBonuses.description: Gain 400 Power for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Stacks 20 times.

equipBonuses.name: Tenacious Luck
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Critical Strike is increased by 7%.

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Brutality
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, you gain a stack of Reckless Brutality, increasing your Power by 2000 but increasing your damage taken by 2% for 5 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

equipBonuses.name: Death Defying Advantage
equipBonuses.description: Gain 2% Combat Advantage for each enemy you are engaged in battle within 100'. (Max of 10 targets)

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Furor
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to 20% bonus Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Currently: 0 Damage (100%). Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

equipBonuses.name: Scaled Disdain
equipBonuses.description: Grants up to -9% Incoming Damage when your total item level is being scaled down. Currently: -0% Incoming Damage. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

equipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Might
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to gain 7500 Power for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Charged Focus
equipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Critical Severity is increased by 5000.

equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Ferocity
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Critical Severity increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Advantage
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 650 Combat Advantage, to the max of 7800.

name: Durgarn Thord Bow
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you gain an encounter or daily power during combat, you gain a stack of Scalebreaker's Ire for 20 seconds. Each stack of Scalebreaker's Ire grants you additional Boosts bonuses depending on your role. DPS: +1% Recharge Speed and Action Point Gain. Tank: +1% Stamina Regeneration and Action Point Gain. Healer: +1% Movement Speed and Action Point Gain. Once you reach 6 stacks of Scalebreaker's Ire, they are consumed and you are empowered with Scalebreaker's Wrath for 30 seconds, granting the following, depending on your role: DPS: +7.5% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -7.5% Incoming Damage. Healer: +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing. You may only have 1 stack of Scalebreaker's Wrath at a time and the duration is refreshed each time you reach 6 stacks of Scalebreaker's Ire.
source: The Crown of Keldegonn (Weapons of the Vale, Set 1 of 11)
